title: CHASE
description: Return the final answer for each CHASE dev conversational natural-language-to-SQL item.
baseline_summary: A placeholder SQL solver that always returns SELECT 1.

objective_spec.summary_template: Higher accuracy is better across independently evolved CHASE text-to-SQL question runs under Spider execution evaluation.

prompt_context: Edit editable.py only. The entry symbol solve(question: dict) must return a SQL string for the current CHASE text-to-SQL item. The verifier is adapter-style: it extracts SQL text from the return value, parses both predicted SQL and gold SQL with the Spider official parser against the local sqlite database, executes both queries, and scores Spider official execution match.
